title: Collectorate Rayagada Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Launch Driver & Khalasi Posts
short_info: Collectorate Rayagada has released the official Launch Driver & Khalasi Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 513 /VI-01/2026 at Rayagada District Official Website. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced under the Collectorate Rayagada Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates possessing a 2nd Class Launch Driving Certificate from Director of Ports and Inland Water Transport, Odisha and Crew Training completion certificate can apply offline up to 06 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: 2nd class Launch Driving Certificate from Director of Ports and Inland Water Transport, Odisha, Crew Training completion certificate from Crew Training Institute
qualification.details: Launch Driver: Minimum 2nd class Launch Driving Certificate issued by proper authority. Khalasi: Crew Training completion certificate from Crew Training Institute.

selection_process: Technical Test Swimming Test Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Collectorate Rayagada Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: rayagada.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Collectorate Rayagada recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Collectorate Rayagada recruitment is 06 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Launch Driver & Khalasi posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for the Launch Driver and Khalasi positions in the Collectorate Rayagada recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Launch Driver post?
faq.answer: For the Launch Driver position, candidates must possess a Minimum 2nd class Launch Driving Certificate issued by the proper authority.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification for the Khalasi post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Khalasi post, candidates need to have a Crew Training completion certificate from a recognized Crew Training Institute.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Collectorate Rayagada recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the recruited candidates will range from Rs. 12,600/- to Rs. 13,900/- per month, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Collectorate Rayagada recruitment includes a Technical Test, a Swimming Test, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Collectorate Rayagada recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply offline by sending their filled application form along with required documents to the address specified in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Launch Driver and Khalasi are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which provides direct links to the relevant resources.
